positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    japanese_company(j_company)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    created(j_company,legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~sells_more_than_one_million(X0) | top10(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    japanese_company(sK0(X0)) | ~top10(X0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    sells_more_than_one_million(legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    created(sK0(X0),X0) | ~top10(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    top10(legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u18,negated_conjecture,
    ~created(X0,fifa_22) | ~japanese_company(X0)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~top10(fifa_22)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
